untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'channel-normalized values' for two distinct price series with divergence measurement between them. Available indicators (bb_pct_b, price_pos_20) only support single-series normalization. True dual-series divergence comparison (Series A vs Series B) cannot be expressed with allowed indicator set, which lacks cross-series comparison operators or multi-series channel indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated using Bollinger Band percentage B (0-1 scale) and price position in 20-period channel (price_pos_20) as proxies for channel-normalized values. Entry when one series at extreme high (≥0.75) and other at extreme low (≤0.25) with spread ≥0.50. Exit on mean reversion toward 0.50 or bandwidth contraction <0.40. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction interpreted as LONG on Series A strength, SHORT on Series B strength.
